cards.meaning: once; in the event that — a hypothetical condition whose consequence is near-inevitable
cards.example: 一旦停火破裂，油价就上涨。
cards.examplePinyin: yī dàn tíng huǒ pò liè, yóu jià jiù shàng zhǎng
cards.exampleMeaning: Once the ceasefire breaks, oil prices rise.
cards.note: Advanced connective, 书面语 / news register. Stronger than 如果 (rúguǒ, 'if'): 一旦 marks a condition whose consequence follows almost inevitably, often carrying a note of worry. Lives in the 一旦……就…… frame — pair it with 就.

cards.meaning: to intensify; to aggravate — to make a bad situation more severe
cards.example: 中东局势加剧了通胀压力。
cards.examplePinyin: zhōng dōng jú shì jiā jù le tōng zhàng yā lì
cards.exampleMeaning: The Middle East situation has intensified inflationary pressure.
cards.note: Abstract, 书面语 / finance-desk verb. Unlike neutral 增加 (zēngjiā, 'to increase' — a quantity goes up, can be good), 加剧 is almost always negative: 矛盾加剧, 危机加剧, 通胀加剧. You'd never say 加剧收入. Collocates with problem-words.

cards.meaning: restless, deep-seated anxiety; unsettled in mind
cards.example: Balisá ang mga mamumuhunan dahil sa pagbagsak ng tigil-putukan.
cards.exampleMeaning: Investors are anxious because of the collapse of the ceasefire.
cards.note: Weightier than 'kabado.' Kabado is temporary and situational — nerves before a presentation. Balisá is deeper and lingering, an unsettled state you can't pin to one exact cause — the word for a whole market on edge, not just a passing case of nerves.

cards.meaning: apprehension; foreboding dread about something that may happen
cards.example: May pangambá ang mga pamilyang Pilipino sa muling pagtaas ng presyo.
cards.exampleMeaning: Filipino families feel apprehension over the renewed rise in prices.
cards.note: Future-focused and reasoned, unlike broad, immediate 'takot' (plain fear — takot sa aso, fear of a dog). Pangambá is apprehension with a basis — over inflation, over a storm — and lands almost like a forecast. A higher, more deliberate register.
cards.tiesTo: households' fear as oil and food prices climb again
